# MindMate

> MindMate is an AI productivity companion that helps you plan fewer, better tasks each day across Work, Life, and Balance.

MindMate keeps daily planning simple: a maximum of 5 micro-tasks across 3 domains, with adaptive AI suggestions and supportive feedback.

## Pages

- [About](/about): What MindMate is and the philosophy behind fewer, better tasks.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a MindMate account.
